case_title: PACIFIC CLEAN AIR VS GONZALEZ, MARIA PATRICIA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC CLEAN AIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIA PATRICIA $1,531.97 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,561.97, VACUUM SYSTEM TO BE REPAIRED BY PLAINTIFF BY 10/6/97.
